reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
울 딸애가 바잇미만 고집하는데 저두 여기로 갈아탔네요
상품 써보니 괜찮아 앞으로 쭈욱 이용하려구요

reviews.content_en: My daughter only insists on BITE ME, so I switched over too. The product works great and I plan to keep using it going forward. The pee pads are nice and thick, really good quality. Once I finish these, I'll definitely buy this product again.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
패드는 진짜 여러가지 다 써보았는데 
보솜패드로 약 7개월 이상 일단 정착 중입니다! 
블랙패드 쓰다가 사실 상 소변색으로 아이의 건강도 체크하는데
보이지 않아 아직은 어려도 혹시 모르는 문제라 
하얀패드로 바꾸게 되었고 
두툼 흡수는 다소 느린점도 있고 
최근 아이가 소변을 실내에서
참다보는건지  양이 조금 많은 편인건지 모르겠으나
요즘들어 발도장이 생겨 매트를 찍고 다니긴 하지만 
현재까지는 그래도 만족하며 쓰고있어요!
reviews.content_en: I've tried so many different pads, but I've been settling on BOSOM pads for over 7 months now! I was using black pads and checking my pup's health based on urine color, but since you can't see it, I switched to white pads in case there's any issue. The thick absorption is a bit slow sometimes, and recently my pup has been holding it in, so I'm not sure if the urine volume is getting larger, but lately there are paw prints and she's tracking around the mat. Still, I'm satisfied with it so far!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
보솜패드에 정착한지 1년정도 되었는데 최근에 리뉴얼된 패드 너무 마음에 들어서 후기 남겨요! 기존 보솜패드는 다 좋았는데 패드 자체가 워낙 두껍다보니 쓰레기봉투가 금방 차서 고민이었어요ㅠㅠ 그래서 여러 유명한 배변패드로도 바꿔봤었는데, 흡수력을 도저히 못따라오길래 어쩔 수 없이 다시 보솜패드로 돌아왔었거든요.
그런데 이번에 받아본 보솜패드 크기 자체도 작아지고 패드도 얇아져서 찾아봤더니 리뉴얼이 되었더라고요? 많이 얇아진 것 같길래 원래 가지고 있던 보솜패드와 저울에 재봤는데, 압축과정이 추가되어서 그런지(?) 신기하게 무게는 똑같은데 부피만 작아진게 맞더라구요ㅎㅎ 그래도 흡수가 덜되면 어쩌나 싶어 하루정도 지켜봤는데, 흡수력은 기존 제품이랑 달라진걸 못느끼겠고 오히려 쓰레기 봉투 차는 속도가 줄어서 너무너무 만족해요!!! 이젠 진짜 마음놓고 정착할 수 있겠어요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I've been using BOSOM pads for about a year now, and the recently renewed pad is so great I wanted to leave a review! The original BOSOM pads were great in every way, but since the pad itself was so thick, the garbage bag would fill up quickly, which was a concern 😭 So I tried switching to several other famous pee pads, but the absorption power just couldn't compare, so I had no choice but to go back to BOSOM pads. But this time the pad I received is smaller in size and thinner, so I looked it up and it turned out to be a renewal! Since it seemed much thinner, I weighed it against my original BOSOM pad, and interestingly(?), the weight was the same but the volume was definitely smaller, probably because of an added compression process hehe. I was a bit worried the absorption would be worse, so I observed it for about a day, but the absorption power doesn't seem any different from the original product, and the garbage bag fills up much slower, so I'm SO satisfied!!! Now I can really commit to this with peace of mind hehe

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 두마리 견주 입니다 원래 저려미 패드 바닥에 패드 깔고 썼는데 밑에 새고 번짐이 심해서 더 자주 많이 쓰게 되더라구요 그러다가 보솜패드를 알게됬는데 세트로 하면 가격도 괜찮고 일단 두께부터 디자인까지 제 맘에 쏙 들더라구요 항상 4팩씩 시키는데 또 시키러 오면서 리뷰 남겨요 밑에 실리콘 매트도 바잇미 제품인데 샘 방지되고 물티슈로 관리하다가 가끔 물로 세척하면되서 귀차니즘 심한 저한텐 완벽한 조합이에요 ❤️
reviews.content_en: I'm a two-dog owner. Originally I used another brand's pads with a mat underneath, but the leakage and spreading from the bottom was severe, so I ended up using more pads more frequently. That's when I discovered BOSOM pads, and when you get the set the price is reasonable, plus I loved everything from the thickness to the design. I always order 4 packs at a time, and I'm leaving a review while ordering again. The silicone mat underneath is also a BITE ME product, and it prevents leaks. I manage it with wet wipes and occasionally rinse it with water, which is the perfect combo for someone lazy like me ❤️

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
기존에는 가성비 위주의 얇은 패드를 주로 사용했었는데, 최근 저희 강아지 신장 건강이 안 좋아지면서 소변 양이 몰라보게 늘어났어요. 나이가 들며 다리 근육까지 빠지다 보니 자꾸 소변을 밟아 발도장을 찍게 되더라고요. 그래서 이번에는 좀 더 두툼하고 흡수력이 좋은 제품을 찾다가 보솜패드 대형으로 바꿔보게 되었습니다.

​1. 2배 더 두툼한 안심 두께
​제품을 꺼내보자마자 가장 먼저 느껴진 건 압도적인 두께감이었어요. 기존에 쓰던 일반 패드들과 비교하면 거의 2배 정도는 더 두꺼운 느낌이라, 소변 양이 많은 저희 강아지가 사용해도 충분히 감당할 수 있겠다는 확신이 들더라고요. 실제로 사용해 보니 많은 양의 소변도 빠르게 흡수해 줘서 발바닥에 묻어나는 게 확실히 줄었습니다.

​2. 찢어질 걱정 없는 견고한 뒷면
​보솜패드를 쓰면서 가장 만족스러웠던 포인트 중 하나는 바로 패드 뒷면의 견고함이에요. 보통 흡수층이 두꺼우면 뒷면 비닐이 약해서 강아지가 움직일 때 찢어지거나 밀리는 경우가 종종 있거든요. 그런데 이 제품은 뒷면 마감이 아주 탄탄하게 되어 있어서, 강아지가 패드 위에서 움직여도 찢어질 걱정 없이 안심하고 사용할 수 있었습니다.

​3. 돈값 하는 든든한 사용감
​사실 얇은 패드 여러 장을 겹쳐 까는 것보다, 이렇게 제대로 된 두꺼운 패드 한 장을 쓰는 게 훨씬 경제적이고 위생적이라는 생각이 들어요. 패드 자체가 묵직하고 견고하니까 뒤처리할 때도 소변이 샐까 봐 조마조마하지 않아도 되어서 정말 편합니다.

​솔직한 총평
​소변 양이 많아 고민이거나 저희 강아지처럼 다리 힘이 부족해 발도장이 걱정되는 집이라면, 보솜패드 대형이 아주 좋은 대안이 될 것 같아요. 2배 더 두꺼운 흡수층과 탄탄한 뒷면 덕분에 보호자인 저도 스트레스가 많이 줄었습니다.
reviews.content_en:
I used to mainly use thin budget-friendly pads, but recently my dog's kidney health declined and urine volume increased noticeably. With age, my dog lost leg muscle too, so she keeps stepping in urine and leaving paw prints. So this time I looked for thicker, more absorbent pads and switched to the BOSOM large size.

1. 2x Thicker Peace of Mind
The first thing I felt when I took the product out was the overwhelming thickness. Compared to the regular pads I used before, it felt almost 2x thicker, so I was confident my dog with heavy urine volume could handle it. In actual use, it quickly absorbs large amounts of urine, and there's definitely less soiling on the paws.

2. Sturdy Back That Won't Tear
One of the most satisfying points about BOSOM pads is the sturdiness of the back. Usually, when the absorbent layer is thick, the vinyl backing is weak, so when dogs move around, it often tears or shifts. But this product has a very solid back finish, so even when my dog moves around on the pad, I can use it without worry about tearing.

3. Reliable Value for Money
Honestly, using one proper thick pad like this is much more economical and hygienic than layering multiple thin pads. Since the pad itself is substantial and sturdy, I don't have to worry about leaks when cleaning up afterward, which is really convenient.

Honest Overall Thoughts
If you're concerned about heavy urine volume or worried about paw prints like my dog with weakened leg strength, BOSOM large pads would be an excellent alternative. Thanks to the 2x thicker absorbent layer and sturdy back, even I as the pet parent have significantly reduced stress.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 3번째 구매인데 일단 보솜패드는 두툼한 두께로 오래쓸수있고 미끌림도 덜하고 흡수력이 진짜 좋아요! 배변패드 유목민으로 살고 있었는데 보솜패드로 정착할려고요 이 품질로 이 가격으로 만들어 줘서 정말 고마운 패드예요!!!
reviews.content_en: This is my third purchase, and BOSOM pads have a thick build so you can use them longer, they slip less, and the absorption is really good! I've been a pee pad nomad, but I'm settling on BOSOM pads now. Thank you so much for making such quality at this price!!!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
이 패드를 모르기 전으로  돌아가는건 상상도 못할 것 같아요. 좋은제품 합리적인 가격에 팔아주셔서 진짜 진짜 감사합니다.....
매일아침 거실로 나가면 패드에서 넘친 쉬,응가 치우는 일이 일상이였고, 외출 후 집에 들어오면 꼭 패드 모서리에 싸는 우리집똥깡아지 때문에 바닥에 묻은 배변 아무리 닦아내고 소독을 뿌려도 냄새가 많이 났어요. 우리집 강아지는 물을 정말 많이 마시는데요, 하루에 쉬를 7-10번은 하는것같아요. 거기다가 배변을 거실 두곳에서 하는데요, 꼭 배변패드 모서리에다 하는게 특기에요 ^^그래서 하나는 높이 올라와있는 배변판을 사주었는데 거기 들어가는것을 싫어하고 힘들어 해서 그냥 패드위에다가만 싸려고 하거든요. 제가 있는 눈 앞에서는 배변판을 사용하려고 하는데, 꼭 사람이 안보이면 다른곳 가서 배변 패드 모서리에다가 하곤해요. 지금 저와 같은 심정의 견주분들이 계시다면... 망설이지 말고 구매하세요 ㅠㅠ패드 양 옆으로 쉬아 흘리고 이것때문에 눈쌀 찌푸리고 혼도 내고,,한숨쉬면서 닦으면 매일 그걸 보는 강아지도 눈치보느라 힘들었을것 같아요. 이 패드 구매한 후로는 진짜 아무리 옆으로 흘러도 바닥에 안 묻고 패드만 세척해주면 되서 너무 행복합니다. 
두툼패드가 옆으로 흘리지 않게 해주는것도 한몫하는것 같아요..원래 쓰던 저렴한 패드는 한번싸면 다 젖어서 하루에도 몇번을 갈아줘야하는데 이거 그냥 대형으로 넓직하게 깔아놔주면 하루종일 쓸 수 있어서 일이 너무 줄어서 너무 좋습니다... 진짜 최고 짱.....
reviews.content_en:
I can't imagine going back to before I knew about this pad. Thank you so much for selling such a good product at a reasonable price.....
Every morning when I go to the living room, cleaning up pee and poop overflowing from the pad was routine, and after coming home from going out, my pup has a special skill of pooping right on the pad edges, so no matter how much I wiped the floor and sprayed disinfectant, the smell lingered. My dog drinks a lot of water—she probably pees 7-10 times a day. Plus she poops in two spots in the living room, and she has a special talent for always doing it on the pad edges 😅 So I even bought a raised pee tray, but she dislikes it and has a hard time with it, so she only wants to go on the pad. She tries to use the tray when I'm watching, but the moment I'm not looking, she goes somewhere else and pees on the pad edges. If there are pet parents feeling the same way I do... don't hesitate, just buy it 😭 Urine drips from both sides of the pad, causing me to frown, scold her, sigh while cleaning... the pup must have been stressed seeing that every day. Since buying this pad, even if it drips to the sides, nothing gets on the floor and I just rinse the pad—I'm so happy.
The thick pad definitely plays a role in preventing side leaks. The cheap pads I used before would be soaked after one use so I had to change them several times a day, but with this large pad spread out, I can use it all day—it's such a huge reduction in work, truly the best.....

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
원래 요요쉬 중형을 몇년동안 사용했는데 구매하기도 좀 힘들뿐더러 저희집 강아지가 좀..모서리에 싸서..뒤로 다흘러가면 결국 한장씩 버리게 되더라고요.그리고 깔끔떠는 편이라 한패드에 2번이상은 안쌀려고 해서 요번에 작은걸로 바꿔봤습니다.

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
다견가정 인생패드 찾았습니다❣️
패드를 사용한지 1년이상 되었는데 이제야 리뷰를 ㅠㅠ
일단 저희집은 다견가정 4마리 아이들과 함께 하고있습니다. 
저는 일단, 리뷰나 광고를 믿지 않습니다. 
무조건 제가 사용해보고 경험해봐야 하는 사람입니다. 
이것저것 사용해보자 하는 마음으로 구매한 
보솜패드 정말 좋습니다. 
먼저 .. 첫번째! 두께감 부터 너무 좋습니다.. 일단 패드가 도톰하니 애들이 쉬야를 하고 밟아도 밀리거나,미끄러지는 일이 없습니다. 또 패드가 두꺼워서 흡수도 정말 잘되네요.. 
다른 패드들은 1번 사용하면 소변이 이미 너무 넓은 면적을 적셔서 바로 버리고 갈아줘야 했는데 보솜패드는 강아지들이 여러번 쉬야할수있어 좋습니다.

두번째! 확실히 보솜패드 쓰고 냄새가 줄었습니다.. 

세번째!오줌을 밟아도 발도장이 안나요! 
저는 매일 아침 애들이 소변본 자리, 발도장 찍은 자리 청소 하는게 일이었는데.. 보솜패드 쓰고 나서는 그럴일이 없습니다.. 정말 감동입니다.. 😍

여러가지 패드 많이 써보았지만 
저는 앞으로도 이패드만 사용할것같습니다.. 
항상 쟁여두고 사용중입니다❤️감사합니다 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟
reviews.content_en:
I found the holy grail pad for my multi-dog household ❣️
I've been using this pad for over a year now and I'm only just writing a review ㅠㅠ
We have 4 dogs at home.
Personally, I don't trust reviews or ads.
I'm the type of person who has to try everything myself before believing it.
I bought BOSOLM pads with the mindset of just trying different things, and it's seriously amazing.
First... number one! The thickness is so good.. Since the pad is nice and thick, even when the dogs pee and step on it, it doesn't slip or slide. Plus because the pad is so thick, the absorption is really excellent..
With other pads, after one use the urine already soaks such a large area that I had to throw it out and change it right away, but with BOSOLM pads the dogs can pee multiple times, which is great.

Second! The smell has definitely reduced since using BOSOLM pads..

Third! Even when they step on their own urine, there are no paw prints! 💡
I used to clean up where the dogs peed and their paw prints every morning, and it was like a job for me.. but since using BOSOLM pads, that doesn't happen anymore.. I'm seriously moved.. 😍

I've tried many different pads,
but I think I'll only use this one from now on..
I always stock up and use it ❤️ Thank you 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟

reviews.name: 쩡****
reviews.content:
포메라니안 2마리를 키우고 있고요, 배변패드는 평소에 싼걸로 2장씩 쓰고있었어요. 그래서 많이 헤프다는 생각을 했었는데,  바잇미보솜패드 후기가 너무 좋길래 평소쓰는거보다 비싸도 한번 사보았어요. 그런데 왠걸 흡수력이 어마무시하니까 평소 쓰던방식대로라면 하루에 2장씩 갈아치워야 정상인데 한장으로 이틀도 끄떡없네요. 향기도 너무 좋고 도톰해서 강아지들이 잘 미끄러 지지도 않아요!
바잇미에 판매되고 있는 논슬립매트랑 같이 깔아두면 찰떡궁합이에요. 더이상 오줌이 바닥에 스며들거나 매일 닦는일은 없을거 같아요. 앞으로 보솜패드 평생쓰려구요!
reviews.content_en:
I have 2 Pomeranians, and I used to use cheap pads 2 at a time. So I thought it was quite expensive, but the BITE ME BOSOLM pad reviews were so good that I tried them even though they cost more than what I usually use. But honestly, the absorption is amazing - normally I'd have to change 2 pads a day, but one pad lasts me 2 days no problem. The scent is really nice and it's thick so the dogs don't slip at all!
If you lay it together with the non-slip mat sold on BITE ME, it's a perfect match. I don't think urine will ever seep into the floor or require daily wiping anymore. I'm planning to use BOSOLM pads for life!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
오~~정말 좋아요
내돈내산 후기 입니다.
댕댕이 2마리이고 한마리 소변양이 엄청나서 대형사이즈 쓰고 있었는데 소변만보면 바닥이고 옆으로 새는게 부지기수 였거든요~
이 패드는 흡수력이 좋아서 옆으로 새거나 바닥으로 새거나 하지 않아요 
쟁여두고 쓰려고 재구매하러 들어왔다가 리뷰씁니다.
패드는 여기로 정착할랍니다~
reviews.content_en:
Oh~ I really love this
This is a review from my own purchase.
I have 2 dogs and one of them has an incredibly large urine volume, so I was using the large size, but urine would leak to the sides and floor constantly~
This pad has such good absorption that it doesn't leak to the sides or seep through to the floor
I came back to reorder to stock up, and I'm writing this review.
This is the pad I'm settling on~

reviews.content:
이제 패드는 보솜으로 정착 해야되겠어요!! 
일단 두툼함과 흡수력은 감히 따라올 제품이 없어요
무엇보다 대형위에 기본형 이중으로 깔아두고 사용하는데 밀림이 없어요!!!! 
소문난 패드는 거의 다 써봤는데 밀림에 낮은 흡수력에 재구매까지 이어지는 패드가 없었어요!
보솜은 흡수력이 좋으니 많은 소변양에도 넘치거나 흡수가 덜 되서 발자국이 심하게 남거나 하는게 적어서 좋아요
두툼하고 흡수력도 좋고 가격도 합리적인데 안쓸이유가 없는 보솜패드!!! 
아직 배변패드 정착 못하신 견주님들 보솜쓰세요!!
reviews.content_en:
I need to settle on BOSOLM pads now!!
Firstly, the thickness and absorption are unmatched by any other product
Moreover, I layer the standard size on top of the large size and use it, and there's zero shifting!!!
I've tried almost all the famous pads out there, but none of them had good absorption and no shifting that led to repurchasing!
BOSOLM has such good absorption that even with large urine volumes, it doesn't overflow or under-absorb, leaving heavy paw prints, which is great
Thick, excellent absorption, and reasonable price - there's no reason not to use BOSOLM pads!!!
If you haven't settled on a pee pad yet, use BOSOLM!!

한걱정 덜었어요 잘 사용할께요~
reviews.content_en:
I fell in love on first use and switched from the pad I'd been using for a long time to BOSOLM right away. Now that I've finished it, I'm reordering.
I was concerned that the pad I was using had changed in quality, but I tried BOSOLM on a friend's recommendation,
and immediately fell in love with the absorption and deodorizing effect,
so I chose it. Switching pee pads is usually a hassle to find alternatives, so it's frustrating,
but I'm relieved to have found a great product quickly.
I'll use it well~

reviews.content: 주문한지 한달다되어가네요.일부러 한달뒤에 쓰는거예요 제대로된후기를 쓰기위해서요. 우선 지금까지 사용한 패드중에 탑급이예요~왠만한 패드 다썻는데 때마침 제대로 테스트할 기회가 생겼는데 그건 울 큰아들16키로인데 실외배변에서 실내배변교육할때 33시간 참고 체감으로 5분은 싸는가싶을정도로 얼마나 많은 양을 누던지 테두리넘어 흘러넘치겠다 싶었는데 거짓말1도 안보태고 테두리넘치지 않았어요 실내배변의 기쁨보다도 와 진짜 이패드 장난아니다 라는 말이 자꾸나왔어요. 저는 이패드로 정착하려구요 ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: It's been almost a month since I ordered. I'm intentionally writing this review after a month to give you a proper review. First of all, it's top-tier among all the pads I've used so far~ I've tried most pads, and I happened to get a proper testing opportunity - my older son weighs 16kg, and during indoor potty training when transitioning from outdoor elimination, he held it for 33 hours and peed what felt like 5 minutes straight... I thought the volume was so much that it would definitely overflow the edges, but honestly, not even a single lie - it didn't overflow. More than the joy of indoor potty training success, I kept saying 'wow, this pad is seriously no joke.' I'm planning to stick with this pad ㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
비숑프리제 여아 3마리 다둥이 가정이예요~~
갑자기 패드없음 당황하기에 미리 미리 구매합니다~
각자 볼일보는 스타일이 다른데 한녀석이 꼭 싸면서 발에 묻히기싫어 걸어다니며 볼일봐요~ 모서리에 싸게되면 바닥에 베여서 어쩔수없이 패드를 새로바꿔주는 일이 있었는데 바잇미 보솜패드는 흡수력도 뛰어난편이라 발도장도 확실이 적고 한방울씩 모서리에 흘러도 바닥에까지 흐르거나 베지 않아서 바로 패드를 안갈아줘도 되니 이거 완소템 이네요~택배아저씨 힘드실까봐 8개만 주문했는데~~ 조만간 또 재구매해야겠어요~ ^^
reviews.content_en:
We have 3 female Bichon Frisés in our home~~
We buy BITE ME pads ahead of time so we don't panic when we run out~
Each of them has a different bathroom style, but one of them hates getting paws dirty while going, so she walks around while doing her business~ When she goes on the edges, the floor used to get soaked and I'd have to change the pad, but BITE ME pads have such great absorbency that there are definitely fewer paw prints, and even if a drop or two goes on the edge, it doesn't seep to the floor or soak through - so I don't even have to change the pad right away. This is definitely a must-have item~ I only ordered 8 packs because I was worried about the delivery guy, but I think I'll need to reorder soon~ ^^

reviews.name: 응****
reviews.content:

My dog usually has pee accidents and comes back with paw prints, but since using BITE ME pads, she barely leaves any prints anymore ㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 신부전있는 강아지라 물도 많이먹고  소변도 자주 보기때문에 흡수력 좋은 패드 찾고 있었어요  보솜패드 가성비 좋고 흡수력 완전 좋아요 남편이 여태 쓰던것들 좋다 뭐 이런말 안했는데 보솜패드 한장 써보더니 이제 앞으로 이것만 사서 쓰자 하네요ㅋㅋ 드디어 패드 정착 해요~~  떨어지면 또 재구매할께요
reviews.content_en: My dog has kidney disease, so she drinks a lot of water and pees frequently - I was looking for pads with good absorbency. BITE ME pads have great value for the price and amazing absorbency! My husband never said anything good about the pads we used before, but after trying one BITE ME pad, he said we should just buy these from now on ㅋㅋ We've finally found our pad! We'll reorder when we run out.

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 인생패드 만났습니당! 다른패드는 쉬야냄새나서 새벽에 자다가 일어나서 패드갈아주고 그랬는데 이건 냄새도안나고 쉬야발자국도 안찍혀요! 감동ㅜㅜ 아마 평생 이것만 쓸것같아요
reviews.content_en: I found the pad of my life! With other pads, the urine smell would wake me up in the middle of the night to change them, but with these, there's no smell and no pee footprints! I'm amazed ㅜㅜ I think I'll probably use only these for life.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
아.. 너무 우울해요.. 700자 넘게 쓴 리뷰가 날라가버렸어요..
기억의 조각들을 모아 다시 작성해볼게요.. 전 의지의 한국인이니까요..

기존 패드 다 쓰고 보솜패드로 체인지한지 이틀차에요.
실 사용 후 리뷰작성하고 싶어서 존버하다가 이제서야 작성하네요.
솔직히 요즘 리뷰알바 쓰는 곳도 많고 고료받고 셀럽들이 광고하는 제품 천지라 리뷰가 좋아도 잘 믿지않는 편입니다.

하지만 저희 애기가 지독한 배변습관을 가진 멈머다보니..
(돌면서 응아싸서 패드 바로 옆에 안착시키기, 패드 모퉁이에 쉬야싸서 패드밑으로 새게 하기, 정상적으로 쉬야싸도 밟고 온집안 돌아다녀서 난장판 만들기 등등..)
'그냥 속는셈치고 한번 사보자~'란 생각으로 단품 구매했고,
결과부터 말씀드리자면 요놈 진짜 물건이에요..

사진보시면 아시겠다시피 저희 집 바닥은 장판이 아닌 돌로 만든 바닥이라 쉬밟은 발로 바닥을 걷는 즉시..기름칠한것 마냥 반짝반짝 빛나는게.. 무시하려해도 존재감이 무시무시해서 사람 승질 돋구는 그런 바닥이랍니다.
오늘도 여김없이 늘 그래왔듯 쉬싸고 밟았고! 결과물(?)엔 발자국이 선명한데 바닥은 보송..? 진짜 보송.. 그 어려운걸 보솜패드가 해냈습니다!!

이틀 사용하고 확신생겨서 바로 매트+패드 재구매했어요.
부디 오래오래 판매해주세요.. 충성고객 약속드려요..
앞으로도 계속 할인해주시면 너무 감사하겠습니다..
소형견 4kg 작은놈이 어찌나 배출을 많이 하는지 하루에 패드 2-4장을 써요. 빈곤한 회사원 나부랭이를 도와주세요.
reviews.content_en:
Oh.. I'm so frustrated.. my review that was over 700 characters got deleted..
Let me piece together my memories and rewrite it.. I'm a determined Korean after all..

It's been 2 days since I switched from my old pads to BITE ME pads.
I wanted to write a review after actual use, so I waited, and now I'm finally writing it.
Honestly, these days there are so many paid review sites and celebrities advertising products for money, so even if reviews are good, I usually don't trust them much.

But my baby has such stubborn bathroom habits..
(pooping right next to the pad after turning, peeing on the pad edge causing it to leak under, or peeing normally but then stepping on it and tracking it all over the house, etc..)
So I thought 'I'll just take the plunge and try buying one,' and bought a single pack.
To cut to the chase - this product is the real deal..

As you can see from the photos, our floor is made of stone, not linoleum, so the moment my dog walks on the floor with pee on her paws.. it shines like oil was just applied.. it's so blatantly obvious even if I try to ignore it, it really gets on my nerves.
Today as always, she peed and stepped on it as she always does! The footprints are clear on the result(?), but the floor is dry..? Really dry.. BITE ME pads pulled off something really difficult!!

After using it for 2 days and becoming convinced, I immediately reordered the mat + pads.
Please keep selling these for a long time.. I promise to be a loyal customer..
If you keep giving discounts, I'll be so grateful..
My little 4kg toy pup produces so much that she uses 2-4 pads a day. Please help this struggling office worker out.

reviews.content_en: I used to hop between different potty pads! Because accidents were frequent, I tried everything good out there, and this product was the best!! This is leftover from before, but I'm still using it so I'm keeping this photo~~

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content: 배송이 빨리왔어요! 평일저녁에 시켯는데 ㄷㅏ음날 오후에 왔더라구요, 일단 다른패드보단 도톰해요 확실히 다른분들보면 크기가 좀 작다 하는데 전 아직 80일된아기라서 그런 지 크기는 작진않아요 가격도 이정도면 착한 것 같구요, 좀 써보고 괜찮으면 세일 전에 쟁여두려구요 이거 깔아주니깐 바로 쉬야를 하더라구요..^^ 아가도 맘에 들어하는 거같아서 다행이예요
reviews.content_en: Shipping came quickly! I ordered on a weekday evening and it arrived the next afternoon. It's definitely thicker than other pads. I see some people say the size is a bit small, but since my baby is only 80 days old, I don't think it's small. The price seems reasonable too. I'll use it for a bit and if it's good, I'll stock up before the sale ends. As soon as I put this down, she goes pee right away ^^. My baby seems to like it too, so I'm glad!

reviews.name: e****
reviews.content: 장점 1. 가장자리에 소변을 싸도 테두리에 안샘(막아줌) 2. 타 제품 대비 정말 두꺼움 3. 크기가 정말 큼 4. 흡수 잘되서 아이들도 좋아함 5. 크기가 크다보니 실수할 일이 아주 현저히 적음 6. 세일가격에 구매했지만 200매 28000원꼴이라 가격대 좋음. 꾸준히 쓰고 싶은데 가격만 안오른다면 꾸준히 쓸 예정. 몇 장 안남아서 또 구매하러 왔음.  단점 1. 음 딱히 없음 ㅎㅎ  사진은 타제품과 비교. 타 제품은 숯성분 제품이며 두께는 비슷한 편입니다, 사이즈 비교 ㅎㅎ 타제품도 흡수력은 맘에 드나 재질 때문인지 너무 펄럭 거림 ㅠ-ㅠ 한번만 아이들이 스쳐지나가도 막 뒤집어지고 난리남
reviews.content_en: Pros 1. Even when pee goes on the edges, it doesn't leak from the borders (it contains it) 2. Really much thicker compared to other products 3. Size is really large 4. Great absorbency so the pups love it 5. Because the size is big, accidents are significantly reduced 6. I bought it on sale but it's about 28,000 won for 200 pads, so great price. I want to use it consistently - as long as the price doesn't go up, I'll keep buying. Didn't have many left so I came back to buy more. Cons 1. Honestly, none at all ㅎㅎ Photos are compared to another product. The other product contains charcoal and has similar thickness, size comparison ㅎㅎ The other product's absorbency is fine, but because of the material it flutters so much ㅠ-ㅠ If the pups just brush past it once, it flips over and causes chaos

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 4팩 다쓰고 재구매했어요!! 핑크색이었는데 노란색으로 바뀌면서 좀 소프트해졌네요. 원래는 풀먹인것처럼 빳빳했었는데 그런느낌은 없어졌어요. 흡수율은 그대로 좋고 냄새도 잘 잡아주고 매우 만족합니다.
reviews.content_en: I've gone through 4 packs and repurchased! It was pink but has turned yellow and feels a bit softer now. It used to feel stiff like it was stuffed with hay, but that's gone now. The absorption rate is still great and it controls odors well - very satisfied.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 강쥐 7개월차 첨 키워봐서 어떤 패드가 좋은지 잘몰라 상품평만 보고  정말 향도 나는거 써보고 블랙이 좋다 써보고 소변유도제 함유다 써보고 좋다는 7ㅡ8회사꺼 ㅡㅡ근데 한결같이 공통점이 얇음...배변실수를 자꾸해서 패드보다 화장지가 더 많이 들어갔네요 ㅡㅡ 얇아서근가 두세장 겹쳐서 해주고 ㅡㅡ또 예민한 강쥐인가  새회사제품만 깔아줌 바로 희안하게 뜯고 ㅡㅡ내 가족 강쥐가 쓰는거라 솔직히 좋다는거 해주고 싶어서 ㅎㅎㅎ패드가 많이 있지만 또 귀가 팔랑거려 ㅋ보솜패드구입~일반패드 2장 겹쳐놓은 느낌  ㅎㅎㅎ느낌이 뽀숑~ 배변실수가 좀 줄어들었네요~~일반패드써야하니 보솜패드 일반패드 같이 옆에 깔아놓음 거의 보솜패드에 싸요 ~~사진보심 두께가 ㅎㅎㅎ앞으론 보솜패드로 정착해야겠어요~~
reviews.content_en: My pup is 7 months old and it's my first time raising one, so I didn't know which pad was good. I just looked at reviews and tried ones that had scent, tried black ones, tried ones with urine attractants, tried 7-8 different brands that people said were good ㅡㅡ but they all had one thing in common: they were all thin... He kept having accidents, so we ended up using way more tissues than pads ㅡㅡ Since they're so thin, I stack 2-3 layers ㅡㅡ and my pup is sensitive too, so whenever I put down a new brand's product, he rips it open right away ㅡㅡ Since it's for my family's pup, honestly I wanted to say it's good haha but there are so many pads out there, and his ears flap haha So I got the BOSOM pad~it feels like 2 regular pads stacked together haha the texture is so fluffy~ His accidents have reduced a bit~~ Since I need to use regular pads, I lay both BOSOM and regular pads side by side and he mostly goes on the BOSOM pad ~~If you see the picture the thickness haha From now on I think I need to stick with BOSOM pads~~

reviews.name: 민****
reviews.content:
4 봉지를 써보고 후기 남겨요~현재 두 박스 째 주문을 했는데 쿠폰에 적립금까지 쓰니 마트보다 저렴해요
일단 품질이 이야기 하자면~~흔히 쓰는 한봉에 100장씩 들어있는 걸 썼었는데
아이가 아파서 약을 먹다 보니 소변양이 엄청나서 일반 패드는 감당이 안됐어요~
한 장이 소변 한번에 완전히 다 젖고도 줄줄 셀 정도였는데 바잇미 50매 패드로 바꾸니 그럴일이 없네요
두툼하고 밀리거나 하지도 않아요~이상한 향 싫어하는데 그런거 없이 순수해서 더 좋구요
한가득 싼 양이 중간에 딱 모여 있는게 보이시죠~소변 냄새도 잡아주는 듯 해요
바잇미 100매도 써봤는데 그것도 좋지만 한번에 양 많은 친구들 50매 강추해요
일단 우리 강아지들이 더 나은 행복한 생활을 위해 조금 더 투자해봐도 좋을 거 같아요^^
reviews.content_en: I'm leaving a review after trying 4 bags~ Currently on my second box order, and with coupons and points, it's cheaper than the mart. As for quality~~I used to use the common ones with 100 sheets per pack, but since my kid got sick and takes medicine, the urine amount is huge and regular pads can't handle it~ One pad would be completely soaked from a single time and leak everywhere, but switching to BITE ME 50-sheet pads, that doesn't happen anymore. They're thick and don't shift or anything~ I don't like weird smells, and these don't have any - they're pure which is even better. You can see the absorbent material nicely gathered in the middle~it seems to control urine odor too. I've also tried BITE ME 100-sheet but those are good too; for friends with a lot of volume at once, I highly recommend the 50-sheet ones. Anyway, I think it's worth investing a bit more for our pups to have a better, happier life ^^

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
원래 작은사이즈4장깔아놓고 사용했었는데 그럴거면 그냥 큰거하나깔고 매일 갈아주는게 낫지 않을까 해서 바꿔봤는데 와 훨씬 좋네요 
패드흡수도 빠르고 바로말라서 발에 묻을걱정도 없고 패드도 도톰하니 아주아주 만족합니다 
이제배변패드바잇미로 정착할것 같아요 
패드머살지 고민많이하고 사는 입장에서 바잇미패드 정말 좋은것 같아요 아쉬운점은 왜 이걸 지금 샀을까 진작 빨리살걸이라는 마음정도?
reviews.content_en: I used to lay down 4 small pads, but I thought if I'm doing that much, wouldn't it be better to just lay one large one and change it daily? So I switched and wow, it's so much better! The pad absorbs quickly and dries right away so I don't worry about it getting on his paws, and the pad is nice and thick so I'm very very satisfied. I think I'm going to stick with BITE ME pee pads from now on. As someone who thinks a lot before buying pads, BITE ME pads seem really good. The only downside is wishing I'd bought them sooner haha

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content:
항상쓰던건데 평소보다 조금더 저렴하길래 2셋 샀어용
더사고픈데 자리가 없어서 ㅎㅎ
매일쓰는 필수템인데 패드 하나당 500원안팍이라 할인때 사는게 이득입니당 남는돈으로 간식이라도 구매하면 좋으니까요☺
중량은 같고 압축시킨거라 부피가 줄었는데 안좋은리뷰들이 있어 혹시나해서 그램수 체크해 봤어요
패드 15장 재어봤는데 제일가벼운게100.4g
제일무거운게 115.2g 이네요
여유 넉넉해요~ 패키징도 귀여워서 구매하는 이유중 하나입니다 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I always use these and bought 2 sets since they were a bit cheaper than usual. I wanted to buy more but don't have space haha It's an essential item I use daily, and at around 500 won per pad, it's a good deal to buy during sales! And you can use the savings to buy treats ☺ The weight is the same but since it's compressed, the volume is smaller, and there were some negative reviews so I checked the gram weight just in case. I weighed 15 pads and the lightest was 100.4g and the heaviest was 115.2g so there's plenty of margin~ The packaging is cute too which is one reason I buy haha

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
배변패드 세일해서 리뷰도 좋길래 구매 해봤어요! 
확실히 저렴한 패드보다 두껍고 흡수도 잘되고 새지도 않아요:) 아기 데꼬 올때 사용하던 패드 다 사용해서 새로운 매트 구매 해봤는데 대만족! 뒷면도 아기아기한게 넘 귀욥..ㅎㅎ 진짜 첨에 아기 귀저기 온줄 알았잖나요..ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 바잇미 보솜패드 이벤트도 하던데 당첨되서 대형도 한번 사용 해보고 싶네요 ㅎ 아직 베변훈련중이라..ㅎㅎ 암튼 만족합니다! 구매하세요~~
reviews.content_en: The pee pads were on sale and reviews were good so I bought them! They're definitely thicker than cheaper pads, absorb well, and don't leak :) My pup went through all the pads I used when he was little, so I got a new mat and I'm so satisfied! The back is so cute and baby-like..hehe I seriously thought it was a baby diaper when I first got it..kkkk BITE ME BOSOM pads had an event and I won so I want to try the large size too~ Still in potty training..hehe Anyway I'm satisfied! Go buy them~~

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content:
너무좋아요!! m사이즈 한번 구매 해서 써보고 처음엔 너무 도톰해서 아깝다는 생각을 했는데 보솜패드 쓰다가 다 써서 선물받은 얇은패드 쓰니까 보솜패드가 진짜 좋다는걸 역체감햇어요.. 일단 패드에 한번 싸고 다시는 안싼다 하는 강쥐들한테는 절대비추고요. 울 강아지는 여러번 잘싼다 하는 강쥐들은 진짜 짱강추!! 저희 강아지도 여러번 싸는데 얇은건 한두번만싸도 갈아줘야하고 몇번싸면 냄새가 올라오더라구요 그래서 그만큼 자주 갈아줘야하는데 보솜패드는 두꺼워서 몇번싸도 흡수가 잘되서 냄새도 안나고 더 많이싸게(?)할수있어요 엠사이즈 사려다가 품절이라 라지샀는데 라지가 거실에 럴치해둔 배변보는데랑 싸이즈가 딱이리서 너무 좋아요
원래 엠자리는 세로2개 가로2개 깔았는데 라지는 두개만 피면 되니까 좋네요 다음에도 계속 재구매하려구요
reviews.content_en: I love it so much!! I bought the M size once and used it, and at first I thought it was too thick and wasteful, but after using up the BOSOM pads and using the thin pads I got as a gift, I really felt the difference with BOSOM pads... First, for pups that poop once on the pad and never again, I absolutely don't recommend it. But for our pup that poops multiple times, I really highly recommend it!! My pup also poops multiple times, and with thin pads you have to change them after just one or two times, and after a few times the smell comes up, so you have to change them that often, but BOSOM pads are thick so even after multiple poops the absorption is great and there's no smell and you can go more times(?) I was going to buy M size but it was out of stock so I got large, and the large size fits perfectly where we keep his potty area in the living room so I love it. Originally I laid 2 vertically and 2 horizontally with M size, but with large I only need 2 so that's great. I'm planning to keep repurchasing next time too.

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content:
바잇미 패드 후기가 좋아서 써보고싶었는데 마침 패드도 필요했고 세일까지 해서 바로 주문했어요~!! 
지금쓰고있는 패드랑 두께부터가 달라요 ! 
월래 사용하던 패드는 오줌싼거 버릴때 축축함을 느꼈는데 
바잇미 패드는 도툼해서 그런지 푹축함이 전~~~혀 
느껴지지않고 세번정도? 싸도 괘찮드라구요!! 
너무 잘산거같아요
이제 바잇미패드만 써야겠어요 👍🏻
reviews.content_en: I wanted to try BITE ME pads because the reviews were good, and right then I needed pads and there was a sale so I ordered right away~!! The thickness is different from the pads I'm using now! With the pads I used before, when I threw away the pee I felt dampness, but with BITE ME pads maybe because they're thick, I don't feel dampness at all~~~ and even if he goes 3 times it's fine!! I think I made a great purchase. From now on I'm only using BITE ME pads 👍🏻

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 보솜 강아지배변패드 대형 80매는 뛰어난 흡수력과 위생성으로 많은 반려견 보호자들이 만족하는 제품이에요. 특수 흡수층이 빠르게 소변을 흡수해 누수 걱정이 적고, 넉넉한 대형 사이즈로 중대형견도 편안하게 사용할 수 있습니다. 통기성이 좋은 소재라 냄새가 비교적 덜하고, 깔끔한 디자인으로 집 안 분위기에도 자연스럽게 어울립니다. 80매 구성이라 장기간 사용 가능하고 가성비가 좋은 편이에요. 특히 배변 훈련 중이거나 실내 배변이 잦은 집에서 유용하다는 후기가 많습니다. 전체적으로 흡수력·편의성·가성비 면에서 균형 잡힌 애견패드입니다.
reviews.content_en: The BOSOM large dog pee pad 80-pack is a product that many pet owners are satisfied with thanks to its excellent absorption and hygiene. The special absorbent layer quickly absorbs urine so there's little worry about leaks, and the generous large size allows medium to large dogs to use it comfortably. The breathable material means less odor, and the neat design blends naturally into your home. With 80 sheets, you can use them long-term with good value for money. Especially positive reviews mention it's useful for homes that are potty training or have frequent indoor bathroom needs. Overall, it's a well-balanced dog pad in terms of absorption, convenience, and value for money.

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
다른거 써보려고 했다가 10매도 못쓰고
다시 보솜패드로 주문했습니다

reviews.content_en: I tried switching to a different brand but couldn't even get through 10 pads before ordering BITE ME pads again. When you're using them regularly, you don't notice, but... the absorption difference is HUGE. Other pads don't absorb well, and when my baby steps on them, everything sticks to her paws—urine footprints all over the living room floor 😭 Even after cleaning her paws, they're still sticky 😭 I was seriously stressed for 5 days straight. BITE ME pads don't leave ANY traces whatsoever. Trust me, anyone who's tried BITE ME won't be able to use other brands. The pad thickness itself is completely different. I'm not looking elsewhere anymore. Please take care of my baby's pee forever 💕

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 애용하는 제품입니다. 예전에 비해 요즘 새롭게 출시되는 배변 패드의 두께가 얇아지고 흡습제를 첨가하여 흡수량을 증가시키는 방법도 좋지만, 저는 기본적으로 패드는 적절한 두께를 가지고 있어야 한다고 생각합니다ㅡ 흡습제 패드는 소변을 머금고 있을 때는 괜찮지만, 정리하는 과정에 압력이 주어지면 걸레 짜내지듯 소변이 새는 경우가 있어서요. 보솜패드는 적당히 톡톡하고 가격도 합리적이어서 마음에 듭니다. 앞으로도 좋은 상품 부탁 드립니다!
reviews.content_en: This is a product I've been using regularly. Compared to before, newer pee pads these days are thinner and add absorbent agents to increase absorption capacity, which is nice, but I think pads fundamentally need to have appropriate thickness. Super-absorbent pads are fine when they're holding urine, but when pressure is applied during cleaning, urine can seep out like wringing out a mop. BITE ME pads have just the right firmness and reasonable pricing, so I'm happy with them. I look forward to your continued good products!

reviews.content:
7개월 비숑 개구쟁이 남아를 키우고있습니다. 실외배변은 못하고 항상 실내배변이여서 패드를 여러종류로 많이 써봤는데 가성비대비 품질,두께 ,크기 부분에서 모두 만족하는 패드였어요~이렇게 대량으로 구매하면 실패하면 어쩌지 싶었는데...후기가 모두 다 좋아서 한번구매해보자 하고 사봤는데 아이가 여러번 싸도 발도장도 안찍히고 바로 바로 흡수되는게 만족스러워요~하루 보통 2장~3장으로 하루종일 두고 교체해주는데 두툼해서 가능한 것같아요~ 
첫번째 구매하고 지금벌써 두번째 구매인데 배송도 빠르고 꼼꼼한 패킹으로 배송되어 패드는 보솜패드로 안착합니당~~~
reviews.content_en: I'm raising a 7-month-old mischievous male Bichon who can't do his business outside—always indoors. I've tried many different pad brands, but this one satisfied me in every way: great value for money, quality, thickness, and size. When ordering in bulk, I was worried about wasting money if it didn't work out, but all the reviews were so positive that I decided to give it a try. Even when my pup goes multiple times, there are no paw prints and it absorbs immediately—so satisfying! Normally I use 2-3 pads per day and leave them down all day, which is possible because they're so thick. This is already my second purchase after the first, and shipping is fast with careful packaging. BITE ME pads are now my go-to! 💕

reviews.content_en: Actually, I came to reorder this but am just now leaving a review. The best thing is the waterproof edges!!! My baby still has accidents pretty often, and pee just goes straight to the edges or sides of the pad, spreading all over the floor—I'd be mopping constantly. But this one is SO thick that absorption is excellent, and with the waterproof edges, there's no floor to clean up. Regular thin pads sold in stores? My pup would step on them right after going, leaving paw prints everywhere. But this one absorbs instantly, so there's no residue on the paws at all—it's amazing 😭 Lots of other absorbent pads are coming out, so I thought about trying a few, but after using this once I just settled here immediately 😄 **The photo on the right shows a regular pad sold in stores, and the left is BITE ME pad—even just looking at the photo you can feel how fluffy and thick it is!**

reviews.content_en: Until recently, I was using Mollis 3-4 use pads and other small pads, but since my dog's urination increased, I also bought BITE ME pads and PetRoom pads. BITE ME has the lowest per-pad price. The thickness is best with BITE ME—urine doesn't seep through as much. I use a ShinBye silicone mat L-size, and the longest side of the pad fits the length perfectly. Other pads are slightly smaller. Without the mat, PetRoom pads are less slippery. Comparing overall value, BITE ME pads have a lot of merits.

reviews.content_en: I have two dogs—one won't use a pad twice and wastes them, the other loves thick, absorbent ones. Because of the pad-wasting one, I kept buying Light at 400 sheets at a time, but then I tried the original BITE ME pads on a whim and my other dog loved them so much that now I'm planning to buy 400 of both Original and Light 😄 Even this pad-picky mom is satisfied with BITE ME pads!
